evals.name: progress-update-execution
evals.prompt: Execute Phase D D.1: Update progress status for completed spec oauth2-social-login. PR #143 merged to main. All 6 tasks complete.
expectations: Should update the spec progress to 'completed' or 'merged' status
Should record the PR number in progress tracking
Should mark all 6 tasks as completed in the progress record

evals.name: status-summary-output
evals.prompt: Execute Phase D and generate closure summary report for spec: add-payment-gateway. Include all D.1 and D.2 outcomes, timeline, and next steps.
expectations: Output should have a clear closure summary heading
Report should cover both D.1 and D.2 outcomes
Report should indicate what happens after Phase D
